$schema_notes.NEXT_PUBLIC_COLLAB_URL: Set this to your Railway service domain after first deploy. Format: wss://<your-service>.up.railway.app — or add a custom domain in Railway and use that.
$schema_notes.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Add via Vercel dashboard > Project > Settings > Environment Variables (never commit this value)
$schema_notes.COLLAB_HEALTH_URL: Optional — auto-derived from NEXT_PUBLIC_COLLAB_URL. Set explicitly if you use a custom Railway domain: https://<your-service>.up.railway.app/health
